stemHtml: What is the meaning of the phrase "Break Break" when used by an Air Traffic Services unit?

options.a: I hereby indicate that all stations shall omit read-backs.
options.b: I hereby indicate the separation between messages transmitted to different aircraft in a very busy environment.
options.c: I hereby indicate that an urgent message has to be transmitted by any receiving station to another station with which radiocommunication has previously been broken.
options.d: I hereby indicate that an incident has occurred and that I will shortly cease to provide Air Traffic Services.
